description: You are a software developer on call for a SaaS company. The internal HTTP API client library used by dozens of microservices is producing silent failures in production: malformed request URLs, authentication rejections, runaway retry storms, request timeouts on healthy endpoints, and missing pages of data from paginated responses. The codebase is located at /home/ga/workspace/api_client/. Identify and fix the bugs within the client/ module so that the test suite passes and the reported production issues are resolved.
